# GitInformation

**Structure**

Information about the git status of a given package, if available.

## Declaration

```swift
struct GitInformation
```

## Instance Properties

- **currentCommit**: The commit currently checked out.
- **currentTag**: The version tag currently checked out, if available.
- **hasUncommittedChanges**: Whether or not there are uncommitted changes in the current repository.

## Conforms To

- Sendable
- SendableMetatype

items.description: The version tag currently checked out, if available.
items.name: currentTag
